name: foreway
description: React components and canvas utilities for building interactive golf course maps.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build ./index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.js --target browser --format esm --external react --external react-dom --production --banner "'use client';" && bun build ./react.ts --outfile ./dist/react.js --target browser --format esm --external react --external react-dom --production --banner "'use client';" && bun build ./core.ts --outfile ./dist/core.js --target browser --format esm --external react --external react-dom --production && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run build
